questions.question: Write a Java code snippet for a simple servlet that prints 'Hello World!' to the browser when accessed. Identify the key elements in this code that define the servlet.
What is the purpose of the `init()` method in a servlet? Provide an example of when you might use this method.
Describe the difference between the `service()` and `doGet()` (or `doPost()`) methods in a servlet. Provide an example of when you might use the `doGet()` method.
